project.name: rawgentic-memorypalace
project.description: Claude Code plugin providing long-term memory powered by MemPalace with intelligent ingestion triggers, semantic search, and wake-up context

publishStrategy.note: Public repo is community-facing canonical. Private mirror lives in STARSAirAmbulance org because that's where the Claude org plugin marketplace installs from. Both stay in sync via dual-push configured in .git/config. The STARS PAT is required to push to the private mirror; the 3D-Stories PAT (~/.secrets/github-pat) is required for the public repo. Per-URL credential helpers in .git/config route the right PAT to the right URL.
